---
title: IBM Verify
---

Derived tables in the `ibm_verify` schema, populated from the IBM Verify
reporting API. Each table is a daily aggregate derived from the raw event stream
in `ibm_verify_raw.ibm_verify`.

{{< include ibm_verify/app_login_counts.qmd >}}

{{< include ibm_verify/auth_total_logins.qmd >}}

{{< include ibm_verify/mfa_activity.qmd >}}
